findings.description: Conflicting policy recommendations were treated as independent FAQs because grouping requires exact question-string equality; no contradiction was emitted and control stayed ALLOW.
findings.root_cause: Conflict detection compares exact question text and does not normalize semantically equivalent prompts.
findings.recommended_fix: Use semantic or normalized question matching and require contradiction checks to fail closed when opposing answers are present.

findings.description: Contradictory statements were weakened into separate narrative bullets with no explicit conflict block, suppressing governance-significant disagreement.
findings.root_cause: Narrative generation has no requirement to surface unresolved contradiction state before synthesis.
findings.recommended_fix: Gate section/working-paper generation on explicit contradiction status and carry contradiction markers into final narrative.

findings.description: Questions with no in-segment answer or explicit unknown responses still received confidence=1.0 and ALLOW control decisions.
findings.root_cause: Confidence formula hard-codes agreement/eval factors to 1.0 and depends only on source count, not answer quality.
findings.recommended_fix: Penalize unknown/no-answer outputs and couple confidence to grounded multi-source evidence plus contradiction status.

findings.description: Answer extraction is a substring split on '?' from the same segment, which can misattribute rhetorical text as grounded answer without validating semantic linkage.
findings.root_cause: Grounding checks verify only source presence, not whether answer content is supported by the cited segment.
findings.recommended_fix: Add entailment/grounding checks between answer text and cited source spans before passing eval.

findings.description: High-signal declarative risks with no question marks produced zero extracted questions and an empty downstream chain.
findings.root_cause: Question extraction relies exclusively on '?' heuristics and misses implicit question intents.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce declarative issue-to-question transformation before FAQ generation.

findings.description: Theme clustering uses keyword-first-match logic, forcing mixed policy/technical questions into a single bucket and separating related operational concerns.
findings.root_cause: No semantic similarity objective; cluster assignment is deterministic but shallow lexical routing.
findings.recommended_fix: Use multi-label or embedding-based clustering with eval cases for cluster cohesion/separation quality.

findings.description: Section ordering is by sorted cluster key rather than evidence chronology, which can alter emphasis and implied dependency sequence.
findings.root_cause: Narrative flow eval checks only non-empty transitions and does not validate causal faithfulness to transcript order.
findings.recommended_fix: Evaluate chronology/causality preservation and require explicit ordering rationale in artifact metadata.

findings.description: Unknown answers are collected in unknowns_artifact but still presented as normal bullet claims with max confidence and no blocking control decision.
findings.root_cause: Uncertainty handling is disconnected from confidence and control logic.
findings.recommended_fix: Bind unknown count to control decision thresholds and narrative warning banners.

findings.description: Key eval checks are trivially passing (e.g., contradiction detection passed=True constant), allowing incorrect artifacts to appear healthy.
findings.root_cause: Eval definitions are implementation-coupled and do not assert adversarial correctness properties.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace placeholder checks with adversarial pass/fail conditions linked to transcript-ground truth expectations.

findings.description: Late-stage artifacts (faq_report, clustering, sections, working paper, delta) carry eval refs but no control_decision, so invalid synthesis can still complete with no ALLOW/BLOCK gate.
findings.root_cause: Control integration is partial and enforcement only inspects artifacts that already expose control_decision.
findings.recommended_fix: Require control_decision for every pipeline stage and fail closed when missing.

findings.description: The transcript input artifact is constructed ad hoc in orchestration and never contract-validated, creating an ungoverned boundary before WPG-owned artifacts begin.
findings.root_cause: Boundary governance starts after ingestion instead of validating first-class transcript artifact contracts at entry.
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce and enforce transcript artifact contract validation at pipeline ingress with ownership-tagged provenance.
